title: Microlicia daviesiana
taxonomy: Microlicia daviesiana belongs to the family Melastomataceae. This plant is a species of flowering plant, specifically a member of the genus Microlicia. Microlicia daviesiana is native to Brazil and is often found in the country's tropical regions. Its classification within the plant kingdom is further specified as belonging to the subclass Rosidae and the class Magnoliopsida. This classification helps to understand the plant's evolutionary relationships and its position within the plant kingdom.
